requirement_topic.en: JIRAMA Grid Connection — 220/380 V / 50 Hz and ORE Project Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: JIRAMA并网接入——220/380 V / 50 Hz及ORE项目协调
requirement_topic.zht: JIRAMA併網接入——220/380 V / 50 Hz及ORE項目協調

summary.en: Madagascar operates on a 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz power system, supplied by JIRAMA (Jiro sy Rano Malagasy), the national electricity and water utility. ORE (Office de Régulation de l'Electricité) is the national electricity regulator responsible for licensing, tariff regulation, and oversight of grid-connected electrical installations including EV charging equipment. Any EV charger installation connected to the JIRAMA grid requires ORE regulatory coordination and JIRAMA technical approval. Madagascar's grid is subject to significant reliability constraints: frequent outages, voltage fluctuations, and very low national electrification rates (approximately 30% nationally, significantly lower in rural areas as of 2024) are structural challenges for EV charging deployment. Exporters and project developers must assess grid stability, backup power requirements, and whether a specific deployment location has adequate JIRAMA supply capacity before committing to a charging installation.
summary.zh: 马达加斯加采用220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz电力系统，由JIRAMA（国家电力和水务公司）供电。ORE（电力监管局）是国家电力监管机构，负责许可证发放、电价监管以及对包括电动汽车充电设备在内的并网电气安装的监督。任何连接至JIRAMA电网的电动汽车充电桩安装须经ORE监管协调和JIRAMA技术审批。马达加斯加电网受显著可靠性制约：频繁停电、电压波动及全国极低的电气化率（截至2024年全国约30%，农村地区更低）是电动汽车充电部署的结构性挑战。出口商和项目开发商在承诺安装充电桩前，须评估具体部署地点的电网稳定性、备用电源需求及JIRAMA供电容量是否充足。
summary.zht: 馬達加斯加採用220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz電力系統，由JIRAMA（國家電力和水務公司）供電。ORE（電力監管局）是國家電力監管機構，負責許可證發放、電價監管以及對包括電動汽車充電設備在內的併網電氣安裝的監督。任何連接至JIRAMA電網的電動汽車充電樁安裝須經ORE監管協調和JIRAMA技術審批。馬達加斯加電網受顯著可靠性制約：頻繁停電、電壓波動及全國極低的電氣化率（截至2024年全國約30%，農村地區更低）是電動汽車充電部署的結構性挑戰。出口商和項目開發商在承諾安裝充電樁前，須評估具體部署地點的電網穩定性、備用電源需求及JIRAMA供電容量是否充足。

standards_or_laws: ORE (Office de Régulation de l'Electricité) — Madagascar electricity sector regulator
JIRAMA (Jiro sy Rano Malagasy) — grid-connection and metering requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
BNM (Bureau des Normes de Madagascar) — national standards body, adopting IEC standards

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz — the same nominal voltage as Madagascar — which means voltage conversion is not required in principle. However, China domestic voltage tolerance bands, harmonic injection limits, and charger-firmware grid-protection settings must be verified against JIRAMA supply characteristics, which may differ materially due to Madagascar's grid instability.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，与马达加斯加标称电压相同，原则上无需电压转换。但须核实中国国内电压容差范围、谐波注入限值及充电桩固件电网保护设置是否符合JIRAMA供电特性，因马达加斯加电网不稳定，实际情况可能存在实质性差异。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，與馬達加斯加標稱電壓相同，原則上無需電壓轉換。但須核實中國國內電壓容差範圍、諧波注入限值及充電樁固件電網保護設置是否符合JIRAMA供電特性，因馬達加斯加電網不穩定，實際情況可能存在實質性差異。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger input-voltage tolerance and protective relay settings are compatible with JIRAMA's actual supply quality, including frequent voltage sags, spikes, and outages; (2) ORE regulatory approval and JIRAMA grid-connection technical approval are obtained for each installation; (3) power electronics are designed for or derated to Madagascar ambient temperatures and humidity conditions; (4) backup power or surge-protection provisions are specified if grid stability at the target site is inadequate for reliable charging; (5) the deployment location has sufficient JIRAMA supply capacity and electrification to support charger operation. Nominal voltage match (220/380 V, 50 Hz) does not eliminate the need for JIRAMA grid-connection approval or ORE coordination.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入电压容差和保护继电器设置与JIRAMA实际供电质量兼容，包括频繁的电压暂降、尖峰和停电；(2) 每处安装均已取得ORE监管批准和JIRAMA并网技术审批；(3) 电力电子设备针对马达加斯加环境温度和湿度条件进行了设计或降额；(4) 若目标地点电网稳定性不足以支持可靠充电，须规定备用电源或浪涌保护措施；(5) 部署地点具备足够的JIRAMA供电容量和电气化条件以支持充电桩运行。标称电压匹配（220/380 V、50 Hz）不能免除JIRAMA并网审批或ORE协调要求。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入電壓容差和保護繼電器設置與JIRAMA實際供電質量兼容，包括頻繁的電壓暫降、尖峰和停電；(2) 每處安裝均已取得ORE監管批准和JIRAMA併網技術審批；(3) 電力電子設備針對馬達加斯加環境溫度和濕度條件進行了設計或降額；(4) 若目標地點電網穩定性不足以支持可靠充電，須規定備用電源或浪湧保護措施；(5) 部署地點具備足夠的JIRAMA供電容量和電氣化條件以支持充電樁運行。標稱電壓匹配（220/380 V、50 Hz）不能免除JIRAMA併網審批或ORE協調要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ORE is the statutory electricity regulator for Madagascar; JIRAMA grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected EV charging installations; grid reliability constraints must be assessed site-by-site
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an ORE or JIRAMA approval substitute; voltage is nominally identical but grid quality and stability differ materially

source.publisher: ORE — Office de Régulation de l'Electricité, Madagascar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nominal 220/380 V, 50 Hz voltage match with China domestic baseline does not substitute for ORE regulatory approval and JIRAMA grid-connection coordination. Madagascar grid reliability is a primary deployment risk: assess actual supply quality, outage frequency, and site electrification before specifying a charging installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 220/380 V、50 Hz标称电压与中国国内基准一致，但不能替代ORE监管批准和JIRAMA并网协调。马达加斯加电网可靠性是首要部署风险：在规划充电桩安装前，须评估实际供电质量、停电频率和场地电气化状况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 220/380 V、50 Hz標稱電壓與中國國內基準一致，但不能替代ORE監管批准和JIRAMA併網協調。馬達加斯加電網可靠性是首要部署風險：在規劃充電樁安裝前，須評估實際供電質量、停電頻率和場地電氣化狀況。
